personal.name: Md. Nayeem Kazi
personal.title: Full Stack Developer
personal.subtitle: Java · Spring Boot · Angular
personal.tagline: Crafting robust, scalable enterprise applications with clean architecture

about.bio: I'm a passionate Full Stack Developer specializing in Java, Spring Boot, and Angular. I build scalable, maintainable enterprise-grade web applications with a strong focus on clean architecture, RESTful API design, and modern frontend development.
about.bio2: I enjoy turning complex business requirements into elegant, efficient solutions. With experience across the full development lifecycle — from system design to deployment — I take pride in writing clean, testable code that stands the test of time.

highlights.label: Java Expert
highlights.description: Deep expertise in Core Java, OOP principles, and enterprise-level Java development

highlights.label: Spring Boot
highlights.description: Building RESTful APIs, microservices, and secure backend systems with Spring ecosystem

highlights.label: Angular
highlights.description: Crafting modern, reactive, and responsive single-page applications with Angular

highlights.label: Clean Architecture
highlights.description: Committed to SOLID principles, design patterns, and maintainable code structure

experience.description: Working as a Full Stack Developer building enterprise web applications using Java Spring Boot and Angular.
achievements: Development and enhancement of core banking modules in ABABIL Islamic Core Banking System.
Implement new feature on Trade Finance, Treasury, Foreign Remittance, Reconciliation and Bank Guarantee Modules.
Resolving complex issues, improving system performance, and providing production support.

Collaborating with teams, mentoring junior developers, and
participating in technical design and code

experience.description: Contributed to enterprise web application development focusing on backend API and frontend components.
achievements: Developed and maintained features for Trade Finance, Treasury, Foreign Remittance, and Bank Guarantee modules in ABABIL.
Fixed critical bugs and improved system performance and reliability.
Collaborated with teams and provided client support for smooth banking operations.
Worked with Java, Spring Boot, Angular, JSF, Oracle, and Agile (Scrum) methodologies.

projects.title: Enterprise Resource Management System
projects.description: A full-featured ERP system built with Spring Boot microservices backend and Angular frontend. Features include inventory management, HR module, reporting dashboards, and role-based access control.

projects.title: RESTful E-Commerce API
projects.description: A robust e-commerce backend API built with Spring Boot. Includes product catalog, user authentication, cart management, order processing, and payment integration.

projects.title: Task Management Angular App
projects.description: A responsive SPA for team task management with Kanban board, real-time updates, user assignment, and progress tracking built with Angular.

projects.title: JWT Authentication System
projects.description: A complete JWT-based auth system with refresh token rotation, RBAC, email verification, and audit logging using Spring Security.

projects.title: Real-time Chat Application
projects.description: WebSocket-powered chat app with Angular frontend and Spring Boot backend supporting private messaging, group channels, and message history.

projects.title: Spring Boot Microservices Template
projects.description: A production-ready microservices boilerplate with service discovery, API gateway, centralized config, and Docker Compose.

contact.heading: Let's Work Together
contact.subheading: Have a project in mind or want to discuss an opportunity? I'd love to hear from you.
